hypothesis.observed_phenomenon: A completed close above a preregistered level can mark a conditional regime.
hypothesis.economic_rationale: The fixed level is a minimal extension canary, not a production trading claim.
hypothesis.expected_mechanism: The current completed close triggers one long entry through the common engine.
failure_conditions: Threshold has no stable economic interpretation
entry_conditions: Completed close is strictly above THRESHOLD_CLOSE_ABOVE
exit_conditions: No strategy-owned exit in this reference contract
invalidation_conditions: Future data affects an earlier signal
hypothesis.time_limit: Bounded by experiment end and declared runtime limit.
data_leakage_risks: Threshold selected with final holdout knowledge
retirement_criteria: The extension contract canary is replaced by a reviewed equivalent
